full_text:
Han Rong (Yuanchang) 韓融 (元長)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Rong (韓融), styledYuanchang (元長), was born in Yingchuan. Sent as envoy to Yuan Shao by Dong Zhuo and then to Li Jue by Emperor Xian. Han Rong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
